text.title: Decision Analysis Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml or to the universal skip-this-methodology conclusion.

branch.when: options_count >= 3 AND stakeholders >= 3 AND audit_required == true

conclusion.verdict: Run the 6-step framework with reconciled weights + sensitivity.
Run 6-step with reconciled weights; sensitivity optional but recommended.
Use NPV/IRR/payback; 1–5 scoring is wrong tool.
Retrofitted matrix is theater; refuse or reframe to validation analysis.
Lock criteria count ≤7; ensure status quo is an option.

example.description: When the situation matches the leading branch, apply the referenced rule; otherwise traverse to the next condition until the default branch is reached.
